notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Noah Cameron.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Brayan Rocchio out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Kyle Manzardo called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Bo Naylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bo Naylor walks. CJ Kayfus to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio singles on a ground ball to right fielder Lane Thomas. CJ Kayfus scores. Bo Naylor to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Gavin Williams picks off Isaac Collins at 1st on throw to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Noah Cameron.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Noah Cameron.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Royals challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Bobby Witt Jr. steals (7) 3rd base. Lane Thomas steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio singles on a ground ball to right fielder Lane Thomas. CJ Kayfus scores. Bo Naylor to 2nd.
